narrative_threads: AMD vs PLTR: Fundamentals delivered on both, but valuation is the separator — AMD at reasonable multiples rewarded; PLTR at ~200x fwd PE structurally sold on every beat
Peace dividend speed: Iran MOU arrived 2-3 days faster than modeled, erasing both BRENT long positions and turning a thesis-correct short into a near-WIN rather than clean WIN
Entry price as risk management: AMD post-ATH entry (No.005) vs. at-flag entry (No.003/004) produced -3% vs +13% — identical thesis, different entry = opposite outcome
Warsh transition: Powell exits May 15 as Brent collapsed, removing the oil inflation impulse but PCE +4.5% and ISM Prices 84.6% still structural — hawkish inheritance
AI capex delivery confirmed: AMD $10.25B Q1 + DC $5.8B +57% validates hyperscaler spend trajectory; NVDA May 20 is the next test against a very high bar
